prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.2 kg; Height 167.2 cm; BMI 29.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/65 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 198mg/dL; 9 months ago 179mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 80.3kg; 9 months ago 78.7kg; 6 months ago 77.7kg; 3 months ago 77.9kg; current 82.2kg), Height (12 months ago 167.2cm; 9 months ago 167.2cm; 6 months ago 167.2cm; 3 months ago 167.2cm; current 167.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 29.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 65mmHg; 3 months ago 66mmHg; current 65mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 31U/L), AST (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; current 98mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 47mg/g; 9 months ago 64mg/g; 6 months ago 63mg/g; 3 months ago 65mg/g; current 55mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 109mg/dL; 9 months ago 126mg/dL; 6 months ago 123mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 116mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.9g/dL; current 13.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
